text.title: API Versioning Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: VER-PUBLIC-V2 bumps v1→v2 because amount became required; 180-day deprecation window, sunset 2026-11-23.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: POST /charges adds required amount field. Current scheme=url-path. Public API.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "plan_id": "VER-PUBLIC-V2", "scheme": "url-path", "current_version": "v1", "next_version": "v2", "change_kind": "breaking", "breaking_signals": [ "Field 'amount' became required on POST /charges", "Status 422 added in place of 400 for semantic validation" ], "deprecation_window_days": 180, "sunset_date": "2026-11-23" }
